statement: In every magma, Equation 3580 (`x * y = y * ((z * w) * w)`) implies Equation 4304 (`x * (x * y) = z * (y * y)`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0121
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, (op x y) = (op y (op (op z w) w))) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, (op x (op x y)) = (op z (op y y))
